stomach_abdomen.text: Nausea and vomiting, with great weakness. Griping pains in bowels

stool_rectum.text: Watery, copious, forceful. Squirting diarrhœa; frothy, olive green, with cutting in abdomen

extremities.text: Sharp pains in fingers and thumbs, knees, toes, and instep. Gouty pain in great toes. Pain extends down extremities; pain in hip-joints with diarrhœa. Arthritic nodules

skin.text: Smarts, stings, and burns. Dropsical. Urticaria from suppressed intermittent. Skin, orange color

fever_chill.text: Chill comes on with much yawning and stretching, lasting all through chill. Pain in extremities, darting into fingers and toes. Chills and fever, with spurting diarrhœa

dosing.notes: Third to thirtieth potency. As a hydragogue cathartic to produce free discharge in dropsies, Elaterin 1-20 of a grain. Palliative only

keynotes.text: color="#800000">ELATERIUM OFFICINARUM Squirting Cucumber (ELATERIUM - ECBALIUM) This is an invaluable remedy in violent vomiting and purging, especially if the evacuations are copious and watery. It is a very efficient remedy in certain forms of dropsy. Much yawning and stretching. Beriberi; choleraic conditions; urticaria and mental disorders coming on as a consequence of suppressed malaria. Irresistible desire to wander from home at night. Effects of damp weather.
